description: Official correspondence. Recto: Brief letter. Mentions Aḥmad b. ʿAlī al-[...]; "seeking my master Abū l-Faḍl"; "in this there is courage and vigor"; and a request of the addressee. Verso: Possibly the address. Written in much larger letters. Mentions [...] al-Dawla Jaʿfar b. Ṣafiyy al-Dawla.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
